# Flowbaba — org templates

Default GitHub issue forms and a pull-request template for Flowbaba repositories. Any repo
without its own `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` inherits these; a repo's own templates override them.

| Template | For |
|----------|-----|
| 🐛 Bug Report | Something is broken |
| 🛠️ Tech Debt / Refactor | Engineering improvement, no behavior change |
| ✨ Feature Request | New capability or enhancement |
| 💥 Product Feedback | UX friction, qualitative feedback |
| 💰 Business / Commercial | Customer, partnership, or revenue work |
| 🎯 Epic / Initiative | Large multi-issue effort |
| 📋 PRD | Product requirements (a living issue) |

Forms render at `/issues/new/choose`.
